summary: Russian forces used ZALA Z-16 UAVs to adjust FAB-500 bomb strikes that destroyed a bridge near Pisantsy in the Dnipropetrovsk region. ZALA Lancet loitering munitions operators, despite electronic warfare interference, successfully struck multiple enemy targets in a single coordinated attack. Ukrainian FPV drones struck the Russian frigate "Admiral Essen" in Novorossiysk Bay, damaging its superstructure and onboard electronic warfare systems. Ukrainian operators conducted deep strikes over 50 km into occupied Donetsk, hitting military and logistics vehicles. Ukrainian firm Vyriy is developing new "Lightning" UAV variants with retargeting capabilities. Russian forces report intercepting over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs using FPV drones, with operators destroying 107 targets in a single day.
